identifier_note: Resolve current opaque global control ARNs with AWS Control Catalog ListControls/GetControl before enablement; do not infer them from legacy identifiers.

native_controls: Mandatory: Disallow Configuration Changes to CloudTrail (landing zones below 4.0)
Mandatory LZ 4.0: Disallow modifications to Amazon S3 buckets managed by AWS Control Tower
Strongly recommended detective: Detect whether an account has AWS CloudTrail or CloudTrail Lake enabled
CT.CLOUDTRAIL.PR.2: Require an AWS CloudTrail trail to have log file validation activated
cloudtrail_protection.decision: Do not duplicate Control Tower-owned trail or centralized-logging protections. Validate the deployed landing-zone version and control state.

native_controls: CT.MULTISERVICE.PV.1: Deny access to AWS based on the requested AWS Region for an organizational unit
approved_regions.decision: Use the configurable OU Region deny with AllowedRegions, ExemptedPrincipalARNs, and ExemptedActions; do not maintain a stale custom global-service list.

native_controls: CT.S3.PR.1: Require an Amazon S3 bucket to have block public access settings configured
Strongly recommended detective: Detect Whether Public Read Access to Amazon S3 Buckets is Allowed
Strongly recommended detective: Detect Whether Public Write Access to Amazon S3 Buckets is Allowed
public_s3_restrictions.decision: Fill the direct-API runtime gap by denying public canned ACLs and unauthorized changes to Block Public Access. Account-level BPA must be enabled first.

native_controls: CT.GUARDDUTY.PR.1: Require an Amazon GuardDuty detector to have Amazon S3 protection activated
Service-Managed Standard: AWS Control Tower in Security Hub CSPM
security_service_protection.decision: Native controls configure/check selected capabilities but do not prevent GuardDuty, Security Hub CSPM, or Access Analyzer disablement and disassociation.

native_controls: Mandatory LZ 4.0: Disallow modifications to Amazon S3 buckets managed by AWS Control Tower
AWS-GR_AUDIT_BUCKET_ENCRYPTION_ENABLED
AWS-GR_AUDIT_BUCKET_LOGGING_ENABLED
AWS-GR_AUDIT_BUCKET_POLICY_CHANGES_PROHIBITED
AWS-GR_AUDIT_BUCKET_RETENTION_POLICY
log_archive_protection.decision: Use the mandatory/current Control Tower lifecycle for Control Tower buckets; protect non-Control-Tower log stores with their owning bucket/KMS policies rather than a duplicate broad SCP.

native_controls: AWS-GR_RESTRICT_ROOT_USER_ACCESS_KEYS: Disallow creation of access keys for the root user
AWS-GR_RESTRICT_ROOT_USER: Disallow actions as a root user
Strongly recommended detective: Detect Whether MFA for the Root User is Enabled
root_user_restrictions.decision: Enable the two native preventive controls on child OUs after validating account-recovery consequences.

native_controls: Elective detective: Detect Whether MFA is Enabled for AWS IAM Users
Elective detective: Detect Whether MFA is Enabled for AWS IAM Users of the AWS Console
iam_user_restrictions.decision: Native controls detect MFA posture but do not enforce the project's federation-only prohibition on IAM users, login profiles, and long-lived keys.

native_controls: Mandatory: Disallow Changes to AWS IAM Roles Set Up by AWS Control Tower and AWS CloudFormation
CT.IAM.PV.1: Disallow modification of an AWS IAM role that AWS Control Tower utilizes to manage AWS Backup resources
privilege_escalation_restrictions.decision: Native controls protect Control Tower-owned roles, not general IAM policy, trust, boundary, group, and PassRole escalation paths.
